patterns.name: Hono API Layer
patterns.blessed_solution: Hono route composition for worker/backend APIs
patterns.rationale: Typed lightweight router aligned to edge/server runtimes
patterns.anti_patterns: Avoid ad-hoc route registration patterns per handler file

patterns.name: Service Runtime
patterns.blessed_solution: Node service runtime with typed request boundaries
patterns.anti_patterns: Avoid implicit any/unknown request payload parsing

patterns.name: Data Access Layer
patterns.anti_patterns: Avoid direct SQL calls spread across handlers

patterns.name: Async Jobs
patterns.blessed_solution: Queue-backed workers for retries and background work
patterns.anti_patterns: Avoid blocking API requests on batch/background tasks

patterns.name: API Security
patterns.blessed_solution: Scoped auth middleware and service-level authorization
